raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ad nu tas Kehninsch;
Iſtijus to dsirdeja / fa-
plohtija wiꞥſch ſawas
Drehbes/ un apſedsahs ar twee-
nu Maifn/ un nahze ta KUN-
GA Namna.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Pehz to fuhtija wiꞥſch E-
lijakimu to Aumeiſteri/ un Seb-
nu to Skrihweri/ un tohs wez-
zakus Preesterus ar Maifeem
apſegtus / vee Efaiju Almoza
Dehlu to Braweetu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee faztija ne winnu:
Ta jakka Iſtijus: Schi Deena
irr Behdu / un Lammaschanas
un Saimoschanas Deena/ jo tee
Behrni irr us Dsimſchanu nah-
kufchi/ un Spehka newaid dsein-
deht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jafchu tas KUNGS taws
Deews dsirdehs tohs Wahrdus
Rabskus/ ko winna Kungstas
Kehninsch no Affirijas irr fuhtijs
to dsihwu Deewu apmehdiht un
fainoht ar Wahrdeem/ ko tas
KUNGS taws Deews irr dsir-
Dejs. Pazellees tad/ un luhds
par teem Atlikkuscheem/ kas wehl
atrohdahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un ta Kehnina Iſtijus
Kalpi nahze pee Efaiju.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Efaijus faztijans teem:
Ta buhs jums ſawam Kungam
fazziht: Ta jakka tas KUNGS:
Ne bihſtees preekich teem Wahrd-
deem/ ko tu eſſi dsirdejs/ ar ko
tee Sullatni ta Kehnina no Af-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Rangi/ es dohſchu win-
nam tahdu Garru/ ka tas wee-
nu Slawu dsirdehs/ un atpakka-
ces us favu Semmi/ un es li-
schu winnu zaur Sobbinu fri-
wizza Semmiê.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad atgreesaß Rabsakus
un atradde to Kehninu no Affi-
rijas prett Libnu karrojam / j-
wiꞥſch bij dsirdejs/ ka tas no La-
kita jaw bij atsgahjis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch dabbuja Wehsti-
no Tiraka to Mohru Kehnins-
kas likke fazziht: Wiꞥſch irr te-
gahjis ar tewim karroht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Rad wiꞥſch to dsirdeja-
tad fuhtija wiꞥſch atkat Wehſi-
neſchus pee Iſtijus/ un likke fa-
ziht: Ta buhs jums runnaht u-
Iſtiju to Kehninu no Juhda/ u-
fazziht: Lat taws Deews ter-
ne peewitt/ us ko tu pataujee-
un taffi: Jeruſaleme ne taps
Kehnina no Affirijas Rohkâ e-
dohta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Redſi/ tu eſſi dsirdejs/
tee Kehuinu no Affirijas irr da-
riſchi wiſſahm Seminehm tal-
isdeldedami/ un tew bij isglab-
tant tapt?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Irrag to Pagannu De-
wt/ ko manni Tehwi irr fama-
tajſchi / tohs isglahbuschi ?
Wahrdus/ Gosans / un Aran-
un Rezewus/ un Cedera Behr-
kas Telaﬀara bija.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kur irr tas Kehninsch
Feinata / un tas Kehninsch
Arwadas/ un tas Kehninsch
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
